sql_base_expanded: SELECT "Country", "Independence", "Dependent", "Government" FROM "mondial_geo"."politics" WHERE TO_CHAR(CAST("Independence" AS TIMESTAMP), 'YYYY') BETWEEN '1950' AND '1999' AND "Government" = 'parliamentary democracy'
sql_rename_expanded: SELECT "guo_jia", "du_li", "yi_lai", "zheng_fu" FROM "mondial_geo"."zheng_zhi" WHERE TO_CHAR(CAST("du_li" AS TIMESTAMP), 'YYYY') BETWEEN '1950' AND '1999' AND "zheng_fu" = 'parliamentary democracy'

sql_base_expanded: SELECT "T1"."name", "T1"."won" FROM "professional_basketball"."teams" AS "T1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "year", "lgID", "tmID", "franchID", "confID", "divID", "rank", "confRank", "playoff", "name", "o_fgm", "o_ftm", "o_pts", "d_pts", "homeWon", "homeLost", "awayWon", "awayLost", "won", "lost", "games", "arena" FROM "professional_basketball"."teams" WHERE "year" = 2004) AS "T2" ON "T1"."tmID" = "T2"."tmID" WHERE "T1"."year" = 2005 AND "T1"."won" > "T2"."won"
sql_rename_expanded: SELECT "T1"."nom", "T1"."victoires" FROM "professional_basketball"."equipes" AS "T1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "annee", "id_ligue", "id_equipe", "id_franchise", "id_conference", "id_division", "classement", "classement_conference", "playoffs", "nom", "tirs_reussis_offensifs", "lancers_reussis_offensifs", "points_offensifs", "points_defensifs", "victoires_domicile", "defaites_domicile", "victoires_route", "defaites_route", "victoires", "defaites", "matchs", "arena" FROM "professional_basketball"."equipes" WHERE "annee" = 2004) AS "T2" ON "T1"."id_equipe" = "T2"."id_equipe" WHERE "T1"."annee" = 2005 AND "T1"."victoires" > "T2"."victoires"

sql_base_expanded: SELECT "T1"."name" FROM "professional_basketball"."teams" AS "T1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "year", "lgID", "tmID", "franchID", "confID", "divID", "rank", "confRank", "playoff", "name", "o_fgm", "o_ftm", "o_pts", "d_pts", "homeWon", "homeLost", "awayWon", "awayLost", "won", "lost", "games", "arena" FROM "professional_basketball"."teams" WHERE "lgID" = 'ABA' AND "year" = 1972) AS "T2" ON "T1"."tmID" = "T2"."tmID" WHERE "T1"."lgID" = 'ABA' AND "T1"."year" = 1973 ORDER BY (CAST("T1"."won" AS REAL) / NULLIF(("T1"."won" + "T1"."lost"), 0) - (CAST("T2"."won" AS REAL) / NULLIF(("T2"."won" + "T2"."lost"), 0))) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
sql_rename_expanded: SELECT "T1"."nom" FROM "professional_basketball"."equipes" AS "T1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "annee", "id_ligue", "id_equipe", "id_franchise", "id_conference", "id_division", "classement", "classement_conference", "playoffs", "nom", "tirs_reussis_offensifs", "lancers_reussis_offensifs", "points_offensifs", "points_defensifs", "victoires_domicile", "defaites_domicile", "victoires_route", "defaites_route", "victoires", "defaites", "matchs", "arena" FROM "professional_basketball"."equipes" WHERE "id_ligue" = 'ABA' AND "annee" = 1972) AS "T2" ON "T1"."id_equipe" = "T2"."id_equipe" WHERE "T1"."id_ligue" = 'ABA' AND "T1"."annee" = 1973 ORDER BY (CAST("T1"."victoires" AS REAL) / NULLIF(("T1"."victoires" + "T1"."defaites"), 0) - (CAST("T2"."victoires" AS REAL) / NULLIF(("T2"."victoires" + "T2"."defaites"), 0))) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

sql_base_expanded: SELECT "T1"."Name", "T1"."Mountains", "T1"."Height", "T1"."Type", "T1"."Longitude", "T1"."Latitude", "T2"."Mountain", "T2"."Country", "T2"."Province", "T3"."Name", "T3"."Country", "T3"."Population", "T3"."Area", "T3"."Capital", "T3"."CapProv", "T4"."Name", "T4"."Code", "T4"."Capital", "T4"."Province", "T4"."Area", "T4"."Population" FROM "mondial_geo"."mountain" AS "T1" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."geo_mountain" AS "T2" ON "T1"."Name" = "T2"."Mountain" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."province" AS "T3" ON "T3"."Country" = "T2"."Country" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."country" AS "T4" ON "T4"."Code" = "T3"."Country" WHERE "T1"."Name" = (SELECT "Name" FROM "mondial_geo"."mountain" ORDER BY "Height" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
sql_rename_expanded: SELECT "T1"."ming_chen", "T1"."shan_mai", "T1"."gao_du", "T1"."lei_xing", "T1"."jing_du", "T1"."wei_du", "T2"."mountain", "T2"."guo_jia", "T2"."sheng_fen", "T3"."ming_chen", "T3"."guo_jia", "T3"."ren_kou", "T3"."mian_ji", "T3"."shou_du", "T3"."shou_fu_sheng", "T4"."ming_chen", "T4"."dai_ma", "T4"."shou_du", "T4"."sheng_fen", "T4"."mian_ji", "T4"."ren_kou" FROM "mondial_geo"."shan" AS "T1" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."di_li_shan" AS "T2" ON "T1"."ming_chen" = "T2"."mountain" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."sheng_fen" AS "T3" ON "T3"."guo_jia" = "T2"."guo_jia" INNER JOIN "mondial_geo"."guo_jia" AS "T4" ON "T4"."dai_ma" = "T3"."guo_jia" WHERE "T1"."ming_chen" = (SELECT "ming_chen" FROM "mondial_geo"."shan" ORDER BY "gao_du" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
